allow: PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mobile.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $lines = $resp.Content -split "`n"; "Total lineas servidas: $\($lines.Count\)"; "--- Linea 20202 \(1-indexed\): ---"; $lines[20201]; "--- Caracter 44 de esa linea: ---"; if \($lines[20201].Length -ge 44\) { $lines[20201].Substring\(40, [Math]::Min\(20, $lines[20201].Length - 40\)\) } else { "linea solo tiene $\($lines[20201].Length\) caracteres" })
